destination.description: Inert pass-through. Present so verify-catalog's probe values do not fail strict additionalProperties:false validation; the chart itself does not consume this field.

namespace.description: Target namespace where ExternalSecrets and the materialised Secrets land.

clusterSecretStoreName.description: ClusterSecretStore each ExternalSecret references. Must exist on the workload cluster.

refreshInterval.description: How often ESO re-pulls from Vault. Steady-state defaults to 1h.

vaultSecretName.description: Name of the Vault KV secret under the ClusterSecretStore's `path`.
